name: team_config_bad
note: A rules-and-memory configuration that assumes a written convention holds. The house-style must-hold is enforced only by a path-scoped rule, so it is unenforced when Claude creates a file and merely guided when Claude edits one. The no-secrets must-hold lives only in memory, which cannot block a commit. And a preference is over-controlled with a blocking hook. The same event stream runs through the same engine as the layered configuration, and only this configuration differs.

conventions.name: house_style_no_em_dash
conventions.description: Markdown files must not contain em-dashes.
